summary: Fix 1 (TurnDiffSummary size guard): Added DIFF_SIZE_LIMIT_BYTES = 200_000 constant. computeLineDiff now checks oldContent.length + newContent.length against the limit before doing any line-by-line work; if exceeded it returns a fast line-count estimate with largeDiff: true. FileDiffStats gains an isLargeDiff flag that propagates from extractFileDiffs. In the expanded file list, isLargeDiff files show 'Large diff (~N lines)' instead of +/- counts. Fix 2 (SessionItem rename-cancel race): Added a renameCancelled boolean flag (plain variable, not a signal — avoids a reactive cycle). cancelRename() sets it true then calls setIsRenaming(false). Escape keydown now calls cancelRename() instead of setIsRenaming(false) directly. submitRename() returns early if renameCancelled is true, so the subsequent onBlur event never saves the unwanted value. Fix 3 (Compact button error handling): Added createSignal and useNotification imports. Added isCompacting signal inside StatusBar. Compact button is disabled while isCompacting() is true and shows a Loader2 spinner. The async handler is wrapped in try/catch/finally: setIsCompacting(true) on entry, setIsCompacting(false) in finally, notify.error(...) on catch. tsc: pre-existing errors in SessionDiffPanel.tsx only — no new errors introduced.
tsc_note: 3 pre-existing errors in src/components/panels/SessionDiffPanel.tsx (existed before these changes, confirmed via git stash). Zero errors in any modified file.
